headline: JPM, WFC & Others Clear Key Regulatory Hurdle on Living Wills
summary: JPM and other major U.S. banks cleared Fed and FDIC review of 2025 living wills, easing regulatory concerns and boosting confidence.

headline: Wells Fargo must pay $100M to help homebuyers after discrimination lawsuit — 51 cities are eligible
summary: A new mortgage assistance program from Wells Fargo & Co. could help low- and moderate-income homebuyers.
